title: Free Plan
description: Start your wellness journey free with professional body measurements, BMI assessment, and personalized health guidance today.
features: Height measurement
Weight measurement
BMI calculation and explanation
Basic health and wellness guidance

title: Standard Plan
description: Discover personalized wellness through expert-led health assessments designed to understand your unique needs for lasting results.
features: Expert-led consultation with healthcare professionals, nutritionists, and dietitians
Comprehensive body metrics assessment
Medical history review
Lifestyle and daily habits assessment
Physical activity level evaluation
Living and working environment assessment
Personalized understanding of your unique health needs
Evidence-based recommendations tailored to your goals and condition

title: Premium Plan
description: Transform your health with intensive expert-guided care, personalized plans, and continuous support toward lasting wellness goals.
features: Choice of 3-month or 6-month intensive care programs
Full comprehensive health assessment included in the Standard Foundation Plan
Personalized diet and meal plan based on your health condition and goals
Customized exercise and lifestyle plan tailored to your needs
Daily and consistent follow-up from our expert healthcare team
Ongoing motivation, accountability, and progress monitoring
Evidence-based guidance from nutritionists and healthcare professionals
Continuous support to help you achieve and maintain your desired healthy outcomes

title: Corporate & Workplace Wellness Program
description: Empower your workforce with preventive wellness programs that improve health, productivity, morale, and long-term wellbeing
features: Comprehensive workplace wellness assessments (BMI, blood pressure, waist circumference, and lifestyle screening)
Nutrition, lifestyle, stress, and mental wellbeing assessments for employees
Personalized wellness guidance and preventive health support
Employee health talks, wellness education, and behavior change sessions
Digital wellness engagement with practical nutrition and healthy lifestyle content
Workplace fitness challenges and community wellness activities
Two personalized nutrition consultations per employee annually
Aggregated corporate wellness reports with anonymized workforce health insights
Continuous follow-up and support for employees requiring additional care
Customized wellness programs tailored to organizational needs and employee well-being goals
